phases.what_done: Executed truth check and read all mandatory bootloader/gate/performance evidence files.
phases.why: To lock scope and avoid fake-green interpretation drift.
phases.how_to_use_verify: Cross-check in GATE_ACK and source list in task report.
phases.limitation: Read-only review does not execute runtime.

phases.what_done: Created read-only standard-library classifier for route file size/reference budget analysis.
phases.why: Need deterministic metadata-based asset classification before optimization planning.
phases.how_to_use_verify: Run py_compile and execute classifier from repo root.
phases.limitation: Static scan cannot measure actual compressed transfer/decode costs.

phases.what_done: Ran classifier and generated classification/details/decision JSON+MD outputs.
phases.why: Produce compact, auditable evidence for asset pressure vs CSS/JS pressure.
phases.how_to_use_verify: Inspect generated reports and JSON validation output.

phases.what_done: Produced decision, next-step map, administratum report set, self-assessment, KPD review, and receipt.
phases.why: Convert classification into controlled next actions under bootloader discipline.
phases.how_to_use_verify: Read roadmap next-step map and action card; verify receipt paths.
phases.limitation: No implementation work is executed in this phase.

phases.what_done: Prepared validation command set for JSON/JSONL/budget/scope checks.
phases.how_to_use_verify: Run validation commands listed in task brief.
phases.limitation: Commit/push verification is finalized only after Phase 6.

phases.what_done: Reserved for final git diff review, commit, push, and local/remote sync verification.
phases.why: Close task with traceable immutable evidence.
phases.how_to_use_verify: Check commit hash, push output, and remote HEAD equality.
phases.limitation: Not final until commit and push are complete.
